TIME_SCALE.description: 24 real hours = 1 simulated work week of 5 days

case_distribution._note: Matches PLATFORM_WEIGHTS in crm-engine.js. 1COM and MirtaPBX are Netvill's primary VoIP platforms.

WORK_DAY._note: Legacy flat-pool bounds, used only by the unwired workers/scheduler.js and crm-engine.js's legacy generateDailyCaseBatch()/generateWeeklyCaseBatches(). The live simulation generates per-agent — see cases_per_day_per_agent/cases_per_day_total below and crm-engine.js CASES_PER_AGENT.

claude_daily_cap_NOTE: REMOVED 2026-07-18 (Q&A-engine rebuild) — superseded by config/token-economy.json's shared_claude_budget (a $4.50/month DOLLAR soft-stop under the account's own $5/month spend ceiling, not a per-day call count). See workers/model-router.js getClaudeBudgetStatus(). claude_monthly_budget_usd below is read by no code — it records the $5 account ceiling, not the enforced soft-stop.

day_3_rules.description: Max case resolution day — app usage emphasis

agent_exceptions.agent_9_designer: feature work only after cases done + token allows
agent_exceptions.agent_10_architect: DB integration plan only after cases done

new_features_policy: BLOCKED for all except architect/designer post-cases
token_economy: cases first, features only if leftover token
